title: Aridaria plenifolia

Aralia, scientifically known as Aralia species, is a genus of flowering plants in the family Araliaceae. 

Aralia has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. It is said to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as preventing the growth of certain microorganisms.

The bioactive constituents of Aralia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. 

Aralia is commonly used to make teas, decoctions, and tinctures.
